Site.description: Audiometa is an online audio metadata manager: inspect and edit tags for MP3, FLAC, and WAV in the browser.

MetadataTool.title: Audio Metadata Manager
MetadataTool.description: Online audio metadata manager: upload a track to inspect metadata, edit writable tags, and download your changes.

PageFooter.supportPrompt: Found this helpful? Support us — it helps keep Audiometa free.

DocsLayout.title: Docs
DocsLayout.description: Documentation on audio metadata formats, field support, and how Audiometa handles ID3, Vorbis, and RIFF.

DocsIndex.title: Documentation
DocsIndex.intro: Metadata formats, field support, and how Audiometa handles audio metadata (ID3, Vorbis, RIFF).

DocPage.description: Audiometa documentation: {title}. Audio metadata formats, field support, and handling.

Tool.heading: Audio Metadata Manager
Tool.featureIntroBody: Upload a track to inspect metadata, edit writable tags, and download your changes.
Tool.bulletLookBody: — duration, bitrate, sample rate, headers, a unified tag view, and raw metadata by format.
Tool.bulletTweakBody: — change writable fields; read-only panels stay handy for reference.
Tool.bulletSaveBody: — download your file with updates while the session is still open.
Tool.supportPromptInFlow: Found this useful? Support GrowTheMusicTree, our flagship project.
Tool.editTagsHelp: Values here are written to the file when you download. Other sections below are read-only reference.
Tool.sessionExpiredHint: This session may have expired. Try downloading; if it fails, upload the file again.
Tool.noSessionHint: No active session. Upload a file again to download with tags.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: The page you requested does not exist.
